name: WB011PG AP(T), WB107PG Frag(T)
description:
The 57x347mm family of fixed charge ammunitions are issued to the Type 1959 57mm anti air gun, developed from the Soviet anti aircraft gun (AZP) S-60. The AP(T) and Frag(T) (timed fuze) projectiles shares the same propelling charge, which loads 1.19 kg of 11/7 seven-perforated loose grains. 
Nominal velocity is 1000 m/s. Nominal pressure is <=3100 kgf/cm^2 from copper crusher gauge. Example adopts pressure of 3203 kgf/cm^2 with an adopted charge mass of 1.07kg.
 《火炮内弹道计算手册》(1987)
 《火炸药手册 (增订本）第二分册》(1981).
 《炮弹火箭弹手册：第二分册 陆军炮弹与火箭弹》(1984)
